INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid credentials. Please check your information.
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
OTP_COOLDOWN: Please wait 30 seconds before requesting a new code.
USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
OTP_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: The OTP code is invalid or has expired.
OTP_TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
INVALID_REQUEST_BODY: The request couldn't be processed. Please try again.
VALIDATION_FAILED: Some fields are invalid. Please review and try again.
FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
BOARD_ALREADY_EXISTS: You already have a board with that name.
BOARD_USER_ALREADY_IN_BOARD: You're already a member of this board.
BOARD_MEMBER_ALREADY_IN_BOARD: You're already a member of this board.
MAX_BOARD_MEMBERS_EXCEEDED: This board has reached its member limit.
BOARD_INVALID_JOIN_CODE: That join code is invalid or expired.
BOARD_IS_GLOBAL: That action isn't allowed on the global board.
CANNOT_TRANSFER_OWNERSHIP_TO_SELF: You can't transfer ownership to yourself.
BOARD_MANAGE_ADMIN_FORBIDDEN: Only the board owner can manage admins.
NOT_BOARD_MEMBER: You're not a member of this board.
COMPETITION_PICKEM_ALREADY_EXISTS: A Pick'em competition already exists in this board.
COMPETITION_AWARDS_ALREADY_EXISTS: An Awards competition already exists in this board.
COMPETITION_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A competition with that name already exists in this board.
COMPETITION_FORBIDDEN: You no longer have permission to manage competitions in this board.
UNKNOWN_ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.
